title: Luckxing Natural Palm Spear s Dried Palm Leaves,Wedding Arch Home Decor,Wedding Decoration,Natural Air Dried Real Flower Bleached Cattail Fan Leaves, Dry Flowers Palm Fan
features: Novel decoration: Suitable for bohemian home decoration, wedding arch, neutral house decoration, dry plant decoration, dry leaf decoration, flower decoration, small plant decoration, bridal bouquet. These palm leaves can be used to decorate dining tables, bedrooms, bookshelves and cabinets, can also be used as dining table bonsai.

High-quality materials: These plant palm leaves are made of dried flowers, non-toxic, odorless and environmental protection. Size: The total length is about 60cm, the pole length is about 20 cm, and the diameter is about 30cm.
Life cycle: The dried palm leaves can be used for several years without watering or maintenance. It adds lovely and soft color to flower arrangement, allowing you to enjoy fun of flower arrangement.
Suitable for various occasions: These dried palm leaves are very suitable for decorating parties, tropical Hawaii, beach themes, weddings, birthdays and jungle themes.

Tip: The large spear-shaped palm leaves are natural products, so the shape, color and size of decorative palm branches may be different from the pictures and instructions. Do not add water to preserved flowers, any water added to these flowers will destroy the product.
description: Product description Features: 1. Novel decoration: Suitable for bohemian home decoration, wedding arch, neutral house decoration, dry plant decoration, dry decoration, flower decoration, small plant decoration, bridal bouquet. These palm leaves can be used to decorate dining tables, bedrooms, bookshelves and cabinets, can also be used as dining table bonsai. 2. High-quality materials: These plant palm leaves are made of dried flowers, non-toxic, odorless and environmental protection. Size: The total length is about 60cm, the length is about 20 cm, and the diameter is about 30cm. 3. Life cycle: The dried palm leaves can be used for several years without watering or maintenance. It adds lovely and soft color to flower arrangement, allowing you to enjoy fun of flower arrangement. 4. Suitable for various occasions: These dried palm leaves are very suitable for decorating parties, tropical Hawaii, beach themes, weddings, birthdays and jungle themes. 5. Tip: The large spear-shaped palm leaves are natural products, so the shape, color and size of decorative palm branches may be different from the pictures and instructions. Do not add water to preserved flowers, any water added to these flowers will destroy the product. Avoid placing flowers in humid places or environments. Keep away from direct sunlight. The preserved flowers should not be exposed to the sun for a long time. Do not press, bend or squeeze the petals or stems. The well-preserved flowers are delicate and easily get damaged. Specification: aterial: dry palm leaves Size(approx.): total length 60cm/23.62inch, length 20cm/7.87inch, diameter 30cm/11.81inch Packing List: 1*Palm Spears Safety Warning Do not add water to preserved flowers, any water added to these flowers will destroy the product. Avoid placing flowers in humid places or environments. Keep away from direct sunlight. The preserved flowers should not be exposed to the sun for a long time. Do not press, bend or squeeze the petals or stems. The well-preserved flowers are delicate and easily get damaged.
